summary: Set 069 Session 5 of 6: the quality-gated ceiling->floor RATCHET + the measured REPLACEMENT GATE (proposal rungs 5-6). Ran on claude-opus-4-8 high (operator launch; routed rec was opus-4-8/medium). ALL ADDITIVE + NET-NEW -- two pure-Python library modules imported by NO existing runtime path, so there is zero behavioral change to any existing flow this session. SHIPPED CODE. (1) ai_router/floor_ratchet.py -- the candidate-falsifier artifact (candidate-falsifiers.json) + the quality-gated admission gate. A reproduced probeable defect (a REPRODUCED finding from the S1 evidence protocol) yields a CANDIDATE falsifier that is NEVER auto-merged. admission_decision() runs six mechanical gates (fails-on-old: failsOnOld.failed on a named ref; passes-on-fixed: passesOnFixed.passed on a DIFFERENT ref -- a real differential; drives-public-contract: a PUBLIC_ENTRYPOINT_KINDS entrypoint AND contractKind=='public_contract', so an incidental string/timing is rejected even with a public entrypoint; flake-check: runs>=min (default 3) AND stable AND a strict agreeing majority; has-owner) and ADMITS to the floor only when ALL gates pass AND humanSignoff.status=='approved' (with a non-empty by). CENTRAL SAFETY PROPERTY (the analog of S4's HYPOTHESIS cap, gpt-5-4 confirmed PASS): never-auto-merge -- build_candidate_from_finding() ALWAYS emits humanSignoff={status:'pending'} (only a human writes 'approved'); and a RUBBER-STAMP GUARD returns REJECTED (admitted=False) when a human approved but a mechanical gate fails, so a human approval can NEVER override a failing gate and a brittle agent-authored test cannot poison the deterministic floor. A 'waived' status short-circuits the gates (an explicit operator decision not to promote; requires a note) but admits nothing. check_floor_ratchet_coverage() enforces the MANDATORY rule (every REPRODUCED finding in a path-aware-critique.json needs a candidate that is admitted/pending/waived -- a PENDING candidate satisfies it so the gate never blocks on human-review latency; a REJECTED candidate does NOT count; a missing one is a violation). build_candidate_from_finding extracts the trusted falsifier (commandId XOR templateId + args), pinnedRef, and public entrypoint FROM the reproduced transcript, so the promoted falsifier IS the reproduced probe, not an agent re-authoring. (2) ai_router/replacement_gate.py -- the measured replacement gate. A PRE-REGISTERED benchmark (benchmark-registration.json: seeded classes + >=1 holdout = a recent real miss, e.g. the two 0.22.0 Major bugs; thresholds committed before scoring; minCasesForPower) + a RAW scoreboard (replacement-scoreboard.json: per-case detected/replayed/falseReproduced + spuriousDetections + the gated-surface TELEMETRY the Set 068 DEMOTE said RETIRE reopens on: escapedDefectRate, intro-stage-vs-end-of-set timing, reworkSaved, falsePositiveChurn, predicateShouldHaveFiredMisses) + score_benchmark() that DERIVES recall/precision/replay-success/false-REPRODUCED -- the verdict is derived, NEVER hand-asserted (the closed top-level scoreboard schema rejects a smuggled verdict/meets/cadence field). Honesty rules: underpowered (real_cases<minCasesForPower) FORCES meets_thresholds=False; zero-denominator metrics are None (not coerced 0/1) and a None never satisfies a threshold; a caseId not in the pre-registration is rejected (no scoring against uncommitted cases); the MANUAL run is NEVER retired -- the strongest cadence recommendation is manual-reduce-to-periodic-backstop (the human stays the meta-oracle defense). Three JSON Schemas (docs/candidate-falsifier|benchmark-registration|replacement-scoreboard.schema.json) + example fixtures + the two pure-Python validators (L-066-1 parity); CLIs (python -m ai_router.floor_ratchet --session-set-dir ...; python -m ai_router.replacement_gate --session-set-dir ...). VERIFICATION (cross-provider, gpt-5-4, gated->REQUIRED -- routed_gate trips on blast-radius + multi-module + breadth [7 files]; up-front conventions block per L-064-10). R1 FAIL with claims A (never-auto-merge + rubber-stamp guard) and B (the six gates) already PASS + 6 findings, ALL real L-066-1 parity/coverage defects auto-review missed: (1) rejected candidates wrongly satisfied mandatory coverage -> coverage now skips ADMIT_REJECTED; (2) builder raise contract under-documented -> docstring now states both guardrail raises (non-REPRODUCED OR no-transcript); (3) candidate validator looser than schema -> added top-level closed-key + notes-type + entrypoint.kind ENUM + typed optional sub-fields (failsOnOld/passesOnFixed/flakeCheck int-not-bool/humanSignoff); (4) replacement validators looser incl a VERDICT-FIELD LOOPHOLE -> top-level closed-key set (no verdict/meets/cadence key) + notes-type + non-negative timing; +15 parity tests. R2 PASS: all 6 RESOLVED (cited file:line), regression check A/B/C/E all PASS, example fixtures still conform, NO new defects. Full ai_router suite GREEN: 1953 passed / 5 skipped (baseline 1856/5 + 97 new tests; the 5 skips are the S4 real-podman regressions, by design). Metered verification ~$0.896 (R1 $0.342 + R2 $0.554) + next-session rec $0.003. NO release this session (PyPI is S6); ai_router version unchanged; NO Marketplace/extension change (spec non-goal: no UI this whole set). DEFERRED to S6: the synthesis-doc updates + the PyPI release + the dogfood + change-log + set close. Next-session rec routed (next-session-rec.md): the tier-1 analysis model recommended anthropic/sonnet-4-6 (returning the stale 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet' name + an internally-low 'low' effort for release-critical work); ORCHESTRATOR CAVEAT (a note on the routed output, not self-opinion): S6 SHIPS a PyPI release with known Set-068 release gotchas (green-Test-on-the-tagged-SHA prerequisite + verify-tag-commit==fixed-SHA) plus a multi-provider whole-set dogfood, so capability-for-release-correctness should win over a cut-rate tier -- map the routed substance to anthropic/sonnet-4-6 medium or claude-opus-4-8 medium or codex gpt-5.4 high; the operator picks. Cross-provider verification stays REQUIRED.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (next-session-rec.md) recommended anthropic/sonnet-4-6 for S6 (Synthesis + docs + release + dogfood + close) -- the FINAL session, dominated by doc synthesis + a well-trodden publish runbook + a multi-provider dogfood, not novel complex logic. The tier-1 model returned a stale 'Claude 3.5 Sonnet' name (mapped to the closest current candidate, sonnet-4-6) and an internally-low 'low' effort. ORCHESTRATOR CAVEAT (a note on the routed output): S6 SHIPS a PyPI release with known Set-068 release gotchas (green-Test-on-the-tagged-SHA + verify-tag-commit==fixed-SHA, operator pushes/approves the tag) plus a whole-set dogfood, so treat the effort as at least medium -- capability-for-release-correctness over a cut-rate tier. Operator may instead pick claude-opus-4-8/medium or codex gpt-5.4/high. Cross-provider verification stays REQUIRED (the diff trips routed_gate). This is the final session; the set closes.
